word: H8280 - שָׂרָה - sârâh - saw-raw' - Have power

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרה

Transliteration: śârâh

Phonetic: saw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. contend, have power, contend with, persist, exert oneself, persevere
    1. (Qal) to persevere, contend with

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2287

Part(s) of speech: Verb
